title: QoL Crafts
description: Mostly the datapack adds recipes that replace planks with logs allowing you to craft more at once.
body:
I added some recipes to make crafting a little less tedious.
  
  Mostly the datapack adds recipes that replace planks with logs allowing you to craft more at once.
  
  For Example 2 Logs --> 16 Sticks especially useful if you got fletchers.


Works for:
- Sticks
- Chests
- Composters
- Ladders
- Bowls
- Barrels
- Signs
- Fences
- Fence gates
- Doors
- Trapdoors
- Pressure plates
- Stairs
- Slabs

- Hopper (Instead of a chest 2 logs)

Any input on what I should add are welcome :)
Comment on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/qol-crafts/)
